title: Phase1 Step5 RCA Summary
description: Mobile/static-development contract for the Step5 RCA summary consumed by phase1_ci_gate.py. The current CI gate requires timing_breakdown_seconds.compute, timing_breakdown_seconds.host_copy, and timing_breakdown_seconds.serialization to be finite non-negative numbers. Additional metadata fields are intentionally optional so older RCA receipts remain readable while new producers can attach stronger provenance.

schema_version.description: Optional producer-declared schema version. Recommended value: phase1.step5_rca_summary.v1.

generated_at_utc.description: Optional UTC timestamp when the RCA summary was generated.

run_id.description: Optional deterministic run or artifact identifier.

producer.description: Optional script/tool name that produced the summary.

compute.description: Finite non-negative compute/main-loop wall time in seconds.

host_copy.description: Finite non-negative host-copy wall time in seconds.

serialization.description: Finite non-negative serialization/reporting wall time in seconds.

host_copy_share.description: Optional normalized host-copy share. When absent, consumers may derive it from timing_breakdown_seconds.

zero_copy_pass.description: Optional producer-side zero-copy verdict. CI gates should still recompute or cross-check when strict evidence is available.

strict_probe_ref.description: Optional path, artifact id, or receipt id for the strict Rust/HIP probe consumed with this RCA summary.

artifact_manifest.description: Optional producer artifact manifest carrying version, run id, timestamp, source commit, and checksums.
